task_completion.description: Open the raw text file in ONLYOFFICE Document Editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: ONLYOFFICE Document Editor is open and displays the unformatted or partially formatted text of the Ransomware Incident Response Playbook.
The title 'Ransomware Incident Response Playbook' is center-aligned, bolded, and visibly larger (24pt) than the body text.

task_completion.description: Format the date and confidential notice
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paragraph starting with 'Last Updated:' is right-aligned. The notice starting with 'CONFIDENTIAL:' is formatted in italics.
The phase headers (e.g., 'Phase 1: Preparation') are bolded and visibly larger (16pt) than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Convert the Severity Classification section into a table
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Severity Classification' section is displayed as a native document table with visible grid lines and cells, rather than raw pipe-delimited (|) text.

task_completion.description: Save the document as a DOCX file in the correct location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ONLYOFFICE title bar shows 'ir_playbook_formatted.docx', or a file manager/save dialog shows the file saved in the '~/Documents/TextDocuments/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ONLYOFFICE GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ONLYOFFICE Document Editor interface being actively used to format the text, rather than terminal commands (like pandoc) being used to generate the document.

integrity.description: Verify the table is a genuine document table
integrity.visual_evidence: The table should have standard ONLYOFFICE table formatting (cell borders, proper alignment) and not just be ASCII text manually spaced out to look like a table.

integrity.description: Verify ONLYOFFICE Document Editor was used instead of a basic text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window must clearly be ONLYOFFICE Document Editor (showing its ribbon menu and styling tools), not a plain text editor like gedit or nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file path: /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/ransomware_playbook_raw.txt. Expected output file path: /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/ir_playbook_formatted.docx. Required text strings to look for in the document: Title should contain 'Ransomware Incident Response', date should contain 'Last Updated', notice should contain 'CONFIDENTIAL', and phase headers should contain 'Phase 1: Preparation'.
